rulings.Case Title: JINYUAN ZHOU VS. GREGORY T. SUNDAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT GREGORY T. SUNDAY and BEULAH SUNDAY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Prayer for attorney's fees is stricken without leave to amend. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JINYUAN ZHOU VS. GREGORY T. SUNDAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT GREGORY T. SUNDAY and BEULAH SUNDAY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to (1) the second cause of action for Plaintiff to allege all elements of this cause of action; (2) third and fourth causes of action to re-allege as remedy and/or as a part of cognizable cause of action; (3) sixth cause of action to re-allege as separate cognizable causes of action. Demurer is overruled as to the fifth cause of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges terms of the agreement as memorialized in the joint application for lot adjustment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1625 P, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JACQUELINE MARENCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014, line 11. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE MARENCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. rulings.Case Title: KAYOKO RUOCCO VS. ERICK RIZZOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014, line 12. DEFENDANT ERICK RIZZOTTO and AMY LEVIN MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. rulings.Case Title: KAYOKO RUOCCO VS. ERICK RIZZOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014, line 12. DEFENDANT ERICK RIZZOTTO and AMY LEVIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled. Complaint (and notice) sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer based on breach of sublet and pet provisions of the lease. = (501/REQ)
